project.name: gogomail
project.description: Production-grade Go mail and collaboration platform with SMTP, IMAP, POP3, JMAP, CalDAV, CardDAV, WebDAV, LDAP, REST APIs, and workers

verification_policy: risk-based with strict pre-commit short tests

exceptions.description: Ask before destructive operations, external production changes, credential use, or materially branching scope decisions

rules.description: Production code changes (internal/*.go excl _test.go, cmd/*.go excl _test.go, migrations/*.sql) require at least one docs/ file staged

task_structure.description: The current user request is the primary task. ACTIVE_TASK.md is durable state for explicit harness loops or non-COMPLETE long-running tasks.

loop_policy.complete_active_task_behavior: treat COMPLETE as no active harness task; do not promote backlog automatically
loop_policy.description: Autonomy means finish the requested safe branch end-to-end, not perpetual backlog consumption.

scope_enforcement.product_feature_policy: start from roadmap or explicit user request
scope_enforcement.docs_harness_maintenance_policy: allowed when requested or when correcting stale operational guidance
scope_enforcement.self_selection_policy: next backlog item may be selected only inside an explicit harness loop
scope_enforcement.backlog_empty_action: report no queued harness task; do not synthesize product work unless explicitly asked
scope_enforcement.out_of_roadmap_action: do not implement unrequested product features absent from backend-roadmap.md

steps: read docs/ACTIVE_TASK.md and determine whether it is COMPLETE
use the current user request as the primary scope unless an explicit non-COMPLETE ACTIVE_TASK is in force
define acceptance criteria and the smallest useful verification
for behavior changes, add or run targeted regression coverage before risky edits
run scope-appropriate verification: docs/json validation, targeted tests, frontend type-check, go test ./..., or go build ./... as risk requires
update docs when behavior, operator guidance, API contracts, or harness rules change
stage, commit with Lore protocol, and push when requested or harness-owned
report result and verification evidence; continue only if the user explicitly requested a continuous loop
blocked_by: missing credentials or external production authority
ambiguous acceptance criteria that materially changes implementation
repeated verification failure without a plausible local recovery path

commit_rules.co_author: must not add AI co-author lines unless user requests

domain_rules.protocol_product_separation: enforced — no spam/product logic in SMTP core
domain_rules.library_over_adhoc: use well-maintained libraries for protocol parsing, no ad-hoc string parsing
domain_rules.tdd_order: required for risky behavior changes; docs-only changes use document/format validation

change_history.change: initial bootstrap — test-gated push, strict pre-commit hook, ACTIVE_TASK.md single-task pattern, Korean communication
strengthen loop — add infinite loop policy and roadmap-bound self-selection

harness de-slop — replace perpetual backlog consumption with user-directed autonomy, align pre-commit command with go test -short ./..., allow docs-only maintenance commits, and adopt Lore commit messages
